scripts.bootstrap: node -e "const fs=require('fs');process.exit(fs.existsSync('node_modules')?0:1)" || pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; pnpm run build:types
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build && UIMATCH_ENABLE_BROWSER_TESTS=true UIMATCH_HEADLESS=true UIMATCH_LOG_LEVEL=silent vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.test:all: UIMATCH_ENABLE_BROWSER_TESTS=true UIMATCH_HEADLESS=true pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.type-check: pnpm run build:types && pnpm run type-check:unit && pnpm run type-check:e2e
scripts.type-check:unit: tsc --noEmit -p packages/uimatch-core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/uimatch-scoring/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/uimatch-selector-anchors/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/uimatch-cli/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: pnpm run verify:package-manager && pnpm run lint && pnpm run type-check
scripts.check:fast: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run type-check
scripts.uimatch:compare: pnpm run build && node packages/uimatch-cli/dist/cli/index.js compare
scripts.uimatch:suite: pnpm run build && node packages/uimatch-cli/dist/cli/index.js suite
scripts.docs:deploy: pnpm run docs:build && cd docs && pnpm deploy
